description.value:
Frequency once per day

Effect You open your mind to the shadowy secrets of the Netherworld. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Recall Knowledge] on any topic using [[/act recall-knowledge skill=occultism]]{Occultism} instead of the typical skill. If you roll a success, you get a critical success instead. If you roll a failure, you get a critical failure instead.
